PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>

  ?team wdt:P430 wd:Q4565437 .
  ?team wdt:P1110 ?premierships .

}
GROUP BY ?premierships
ORDER BY DESC(?premierships)
OFFSET 1
LIMIT 1
